articles.title: Investors turn to passive funds as active funds lag
articles.description: Active equity mutual funds have failed to beat their benchmark indices over the past year. This underperformance has revived the debate on shifting investments to low-cost passive funds. Large-cap, flexi-cap, multicap, midcap, and smallcap funds all lagged their respective benchmarks. Despite this, wealth managers advise against completely abandoning active funds.

articles.title: Late rally lifts Indian indices over 1% as traders trim bearish bets

Traders cut bearish bets as the West Asian conflict showed no fresh escalation. The Nifty closed at 23,408.8, and the Sensex ended at 75,502.85. The market's fear gauge, VIX, also fell, indicating some relief.

topStories.description: Crude oil prices surged over 2% as supply concerns intensified with the Strait of Hormuz largely shut. Experts predict further price hikes if tensions persist.

dailyNews.title: ‘We don’t even know their leaders’: Trump shrugs at Iran deal talk
dailyNews.description: Speaking at the White House, Donald Trump said Washington does not know who it would negotiate with in Iran, suggesting several leadership layers had been targeted in US strikes.

dailyNews.title: Irish Prime Minister Taoiseach Micheál Martin addresses how Europe feels about US-Iran conflict
dailyNews.description: Irish Prime Minister Micheál Martin discusses European perceptions of U.S.-Iran conflict ahead of Trump meeting, advocating for diplomatic solutions over military action.

dailyNews.title: Jane Fonda slams Paramount-WBD merger, warns CNN will 'have to cave' to Trump
dailyNews.description: Actress Jane Fonda protested the Paramount merger at an Oscars after-party, warning about the Trump administration's potential political influence over CNN.

dailyNews.title: Trump questions Newsom’s fitness for White House, citing his dyslexia
dailyNews.description: After Gov. Gavin Newsom admitted to having a 960 SAT score and dyslexia, Trump questioned his fitness for office and accused him of talking down to Black audiences.

dailyNews.title: Trump lawyer in Jack Smith case draws conservative backing after DOJ praise rattles 'elite' legal conference
dailyNews.description: John Lauro told a conference that the DOJ was "in a better place" under Trump, prompting criticism from conference attendees.

dailyNews.title: Bessent pushes back on CNBC reporter over Trump’s Russian oil strategy
dailyNews.description: Scott Bessent challenged CNBC’s framing of global oil shortages, arguing markets remain supplied despite disruptions tied to the Iran conflict.

dailyNews.title: Europe Rejects Trump’s Demands for Warships to Reopen the Strait of Hormuz
dailyNews.description: While some European countries said they were discussing ways to help reopen the Strait of Hormuz, several rejected President Trump’s calls to send warships.

dailyNews.title: What Are Trump’s Positions on Iran? They Can Change by the Sentence.
dailyNews.description: The president is no stranger to staking out contradictory stands, part of what his aides say is his negotiating style. But on Iran, his shifting positions are colliding with the consequences of war.

dailyNews.title: Cuba Ready to Accept Outside Investment, Top Official Says
dailyNews.description: President Trump’s words came amid a nationwide blackout and as a top Cuban official said his country would move to open the economy to foreign investors.

dailyNews.title: Trump Administration Seeks to Remove Cuba’s President From Power During Negotiations
dailyNews.description: The United States has told Cuba that for meaningful progress to be made in negotiations, President Miguel Díaz-Canel must step down, said people familiar with the talks.

dailyNews.title: Judge Strikes Down RFK Jr.’s Vaccine Policies in Blow to Trump’s Health Agenda
dailyNews.description: Ruling on a lawsuit brought by several prominent medical organizations, a district court said the federal government had not based its decisions on science in limiting Covid shots and revising the childhood immunization schedule.

dailyNews.title: Richard Grenell: From Trump Cabinet Hopeful to Ex-Kennedy Center Manager
dailyNews.description: Richard Grenell once hoped to be President Trump’s secretary of state. Instead, Mr. Trump just replaced him as Kennedy Center president.
